# vpuppr-gd3

Nix derivation packaging `vpuppr` v0.9.0 — Godot 3.5 VTuber app — as prebuilt binary for `x86_64-linux`.

## Contents

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| [default.nix](./default.nix) | Single `stdenv.mkDerivation` for `vpuppr` v0.9.0; fetches release zip + icon, patches ELF via `autoPatchelfHook`, wraps with `LD_LIBRARY_PATH`, installs desktop entry. |

## Architecture

Binary-only derivation. No source compilation. Two fetches: `fetchzip` (GitHub release `vpuppr_0.9.0_linux.zip`) + `fetchurl` (icon `osfgd_icon.png`).

Install layout requires co-location of binary and resources:
```
$out/share/vpuppr/   ← resources/, vpuppr.pck, vpuppr.x86_64
$out/bin/vpuppr      ← symlink → ../share/vpuppr/vpuppr.x86_64
$out/share/icons/    ← vpuppr_icon.png
```

## Runtime Dependencies

`wrapProgram` injects `LD_LIBRARY_PATH` from `lib.makeLibraryPath` over: `alsa-lib`, `gcc-unwrapped.lib`, `libGLU`, `libglvnd`, `libpulseaudio`, `libX11`, X11 extensions, `udev`, `zlib`, `perl`, `git`.

## Hooks & Metadata

- `autoPatchelfHook` — patches ELF interpreter/rpath
- `copyDesktopItems` + `makeDesktopItem` — `exec = "vpuppr"`, `icon = "vpuppr_icon"`, categories `Graphics AudioVideo Recorder`
- `sourceProvenance = [lib.sourceTypes.binaryNativeCode]`
- `license = licenses.mit`
- `platforms = ["x86_64-linux"]`

## File Relationships

Consumed by [../../overlay.nix](../../overlay.nix) (repo-wide overlay exposing all `pkgs/*/default.nix` entries) and tested via [../../ci.nix](../../ci.nix). Follows same single-file pattern as sibling packages under `pkgs/`.
